# Security Policy

## Reporting a vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability in AgentKey, **do not open a public issue**.

Email **security@agentkey.dev** with:
- Description of the vulnerability
- Steps to reproduce (if possible)
- Potential impact

We will acknowledge receipt within 48 hours and provide an initial assessment within 7 days.

Please allow 90 days before public disclosure so we can address the issue.

## Scope

The following are in scope:
- The AgentKey application (API, dashboard, credential handling)
- The managed service at agentkey.dev
- Authentication and authorization logic
- Encryption implementation

The following are out of scope:
- Third-party services (Clerk, Vercel, Neon, Cloudflare)
- Social engineering attacks
- Denial of service attacks

## Security details

See [agentkey.dev/security](https://agentkey.dev/security) for our full security documentation.
